data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for effective windows and revocation/suspension lifecycle, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or details related to this specific requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for an effective lifecycle, yet there is no concrete evidence confirming that such functionality is implemented or validated in the current saga run. Therefore, the validation reveals a gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of effective windows and revocation/suspension lifecycle.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for effective windows and revocation/suspension lifecycle
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the effective windows and revocation/suspension lifecycle.
